description_long: This warehouse is a rectangular, two-story brick building with a flat, dark roof and a smaller attached annex on one side. The main structure features evenly spaced, rectangular blue windows and a central double-door entrance accessed by a short staircase. The annex has a slightly lower roofline and its own set of windows, visually distinguishing it from the main building. The brickwork is uniform, giving the exterior a sturdy, industrial appearance, while the windows are simple and unadorned. There are no visible signs, loading docks, or decorative elements, emphasizing a utilitarian design. The roof appears solid and uninterrupted, with no visible skylights or rooftop equipment.
description: A rectangular brick warehouse with a flat dark roof, blue windows, and a smaller annex attached to one side. The facade is plain and industrial, with a central entrance and uniform window arrangement.
description_view_0: The front-left view shows the main brick building with the attached annex clearly visible, highlighting the difference in roof heights and the arrangement of windows.
description_view_1: The direct front view displays the central entrance with steps, flanked by evenly spaced blue windows and the annex to the left.
description_view_2: The right-side view emphasizes the long, uninterrupted brick wall of the main building, with the annex partially visible at the far end.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals a plain brick wall with a row of blue windows, and the annex protruding slightly from the right side.
attribute_facade_design: The main facade is constructed of uniform brown brickwork with a central double-door entrance accessed by a short staircase. Rectangular blue windows are symmetrically arranged across both the main building and the annex, with no decorative trim or signage.
attribute_roof_structure: The roof is flat and dark, constructed from what appears to be concrete or a similar material, with no visible skylights, HVAC units, or other rooftop features.
